title: Trump Misstates Facts in State of the Union Regarding Charlotte Murder
summary: Trump incorrectly linked a Charlotte murder to open borders, when the suspect was a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the politicization of local crime and potential misinformation spread by national figures.

title: Hayward: Major Employer in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a swimming pool filter maker based in Charlotte, employs over 1,000 people in Clemmons.
charlotte_impact: Showcases the economic importance of manufacturing in the Charlotte metropolitan area.

title: Charlotte Trade Shows Focus on Brand Visibility
summary: Trade show exhibitors in Charlotte are prioritizing flexibility, visibility, and ROI with custom canopy tents.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks Vice President in Charlotte
summary: Mosaic Capital Partners, a Charlotte-based private equity firm, is hiring a Vice President of Business Development.
charlotte_impact: Indicates growth and investment activity within the Charlotte financial sector.

title: Florence Airport Experiences Passenger Increase, Loses Charlotte Flight
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw increased passenger traffic in 2025 but lost its American Airlines flight to Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the fluctuating dynamics of regional air travel and connectivity.

title: Women Charged in Torture and Death of Girl in Charlotte
summary: Three women in Charlotte are accused of torturing and killing a child, keeping her in a dog crate.
charlotte_impact: Reports a horrific case of child abuse and raises serious concerns about community safety.

title: Mecklenburg County Expands Transportation for Seniors, Disabled

title: Coolest Day of the Week in Charlotte
summary: Charlotte experiences its coolest day before a warming trend brings temperatures into the 70s and 80s.

title: Shooting in East Charlotte Hospitalizes One
summary: A shooting in east Charlotte on Commercial Avenue resulted in one person being hospitalized.

title: Black Political Caucus to Fight I-77 Expansion

title: Tyler Reddick Wins at COTA

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Increases Parking Rates
